item.title: Rabbit Knew How To Negotiate!
item.description: When it came to negotiating, Rabbit knew what he was doing. Rob Pitts shared the story behind one impressive deal-making moment.

media:content.media:title: Rabbit Knew How To Negotiate!
media:content.media:description: When it came to negotiating, Rabbit knew what he was doing. Rob Pitts shared the story behind one impressive deal-making moment.

item.title: I Was About To Build a Garage In My Backyard!
item.description: Before the project got underway, Rob Pitts walked through his backyard garage plans and the thought process behind the build.

media:content.media:title: I Was About To Build a Garage In My Backyard!
media:content.media:description: Before the project got underway, Rob Pitts walked through his backyard garage plans and the thought process behind the build.

item.title: Struggling? A Talk for Tough Times!
item.description: Rob Pitts sat down for an honest and heartfelt conversation about struggling — a reminder that difficult times are something we all face.

media:content.media:title: Struggling? A Talk for Tough Times!
media:content.media:description: Rob Pitts sat down for an honest and heartfelt conversation about struggling — a reminder that difficult times are something we all face.

item.title: Selling the Bad Company Square Body!
item.description: The Bad Company Square Body moved on. Rob Pitts walked through the story behind the sale and what made this truck so special.

media:content.media:title: Selling the Bad Company Square Body!
media:content.media:description: The Bad Company Square Body moved on. Rob Pitts walked through the story behind the sale and what made this truck so special.

item.title: Buying a Rare 1994 Truck 8,000 Miles Away!
item.description: When Rob Pitts found a rare 1994 truck 8,000 miles away, he didn't hesitate. Follow along as he tracks it down and brings it home.

media:content.media:title: Buying a Rare 1994 Truck 8,000 Miles Away!
media:content.media:description: When Rob Pitts found a rare 1994 truck 8,000 miles away, he didn't hesitate. Follow along as he tracks it down and brings it home.

item.title: College Kid Steals 2.2 Million Dollars
item.description: In this story, Rob Pitts uncovers how one college student orchestrated a $2.2 million car theft scheme that left investigators stunned.

media:content.media:title: College Kid Steals 2.2 Million Dollars
media:content.media:description: In this story, Rob Pitts uncovers how one college student orchestrated a $2.2 million car theft scheme that left investigators stunned.

item.title: Easiest Money Rabbit Ever Made!
item.description: What do you think about this story?
